testCases.title: B2B Checkout - PO Number Entry
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] PO Number field visible during checkout for org user
testCases.notes: PO Number field is not visible anywhere in the B2B checkout flow on /cart for Carlos (BuildRight org). After selecting clean address (456 Test Street, Beverly Hills) and Fixed Rate (Ground) shipping, only Order Comment textarea exists. Payment dropdown lacks 'Net 30/On Account' (separate finding for CHK-032). Cart shows Subtotal $100, Discount -$0.01, Tax +$20, Shipping $150, Total $299.99. Storefront build: 2.48.0-pr-2274-0307-0307f38b. CONFIRMED in second pass: order CO260505-00020 placed via CyberSource flow — order detail's 'Purchase order' column is empty in /account/orders, further confirming PO field never reaches the order record.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout - Net 30 Payment Terms
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] Net 30 / On Account option listed in payment methods
testCases.notes: BLOCKED — seed not provisioned. Payment method dropdown lists only: Authorize.Net, CyberSource, Datatrans, Manual, Pay with points, Skyflow. No 'Net 30' or 'On Account' option for BuildRight org. Per CSV preconditions: requires Admin > Customers > Organizations > [Org] > Payment terms = Net 30 + Admin > Stores > Payment methods > enable 'On Account'. Confirmed not configured. Verified again on second pass — same 6 payment methods listed.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout - Approval Workflow
testCases.notes: BLOCKED — seed not provisioned. Approval workflow not enabled for BuildRight org in QA. Per CSV preconditions: requires Admin > Customers > Organizations > [Org] > Order approval settings + Buyer role with purchase limit. Not configured. Carlos has 'Org Admin' role per agent-user-pool.csv, not Buyer. Order CO260505-00020 placed in second pass went directly to 'Processing' status — confirms no approval gate.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout - Buyer Cannot Bypass Approval
testCases.failedAssertion: [STATE] Order placed with Pending Approval status by buyer (precondition)
testCases.notes: BLOCKED — direct dependency on CHK-033. Same approval workflow seed required: B2B org with approval workflow + Buyer role + purchase limit. Not configured for BuildRight in QA. Cannot test API bypass attempt without first reaching 'Pending Approval' state. Without the precondition, the bypass attempt would simply fail with 'order not found' or 'state not pending' — not a meaningful security test of the approval enforcement.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout - Organization Shipping Address
testCases.notes: PASS with caveat. Address selector popup opens correctly via shipping-address edit button. Country/State/Province/City facets present (per VCST-4710 PR #129 scope — checkout popup only). Search input present. BuildRight org address '456 Test Street, Beverly Hills, CA, 90210' loaded from xAPI (currentOrganizationAddresses) with 200 OK; selecting it populates the shipping form. CAVEAT: Carlos has only 1 address (org-scoped), so 'Org vs Personal grouping/labels' assertion is N/A — cannot demonstrate visual differentiation in this dataset. The popup UI does NOT appear to render an explicit 'Org' / 'Personal' group header; addresses are listed in a single flat table with Description column. xAPI response is org-scoped by resolver (per CSV cross-layer note). No console or network errors. URL stays at /cart. Selection persisted through to order CO260505-00020 in second pass.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout - Contract Pricing Applied
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] Contract price shown on PDP (lower than or different from catalog price)
testCases.notes: BLOCKED — seed not provisioned per CSV: '{{TEST_SKU}} with org-specific contract price for BuildRight'. Cart line shows $99.99 with $100.00 strike-through indicating SOME pricing differential is active, but cannot distinguish contract/tier price from catalog promotion without documented seed data identifying a specific TEST_SKU contract for BuildRight org. Per feedback_env_resilience.md and feedback_flexible_test_cases.md, do not assert exact prices when seed data is undocumented. No documented contract pricing fixture for BuildRight in test-data/ (only org-scoped pricing per assertion). To unblock: define {{TEST_SKU}} alias in test-data/aliases.json with confirmed contract price for org id fba51391.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout - Coupon on Top of Contract Price (Apply on Cart via Sidebar, Verify Read-Only on Review)
testCases.notes: PASS. 'DISCOUNT & COUPONS' sidebar widget visible to B2B org user on /cart (Carlos / BuildRight). 'Simple QA Coupon' (code 'QA' = 5% off cart subtotal) shows applied state — green border, check icon, trash icon, code 'QA' visible in disabled state. Custom code input present. Multiple coupons listed: $5 Fixed (FIXED5), 5% (QA — applied), 15% (FREE), 10% (EXCLUSIVE10). Discount line in OrderSummary shows -$20.01 (non-zero). MATH CHECK: Subtotal $100 - Discount $20.01 + Tax $46 + Shipping $150 = Total $275.99. Verified BL-CHK-006 invariant holds. Order CO260505-00020 placed for $275.99 confirming coupon discount carried through to placed-order total. NOTE: Per project_checkout_multistep_gate.md, /checkout/review is gated off in current UX (single-page checkout on /cart). The CSV assertion 'checkout review step shows applied coupon code in disabled VcActionInput' is N/A in current single-page flow — coupons are displayed read-only directly in the /cart sidebar (achieves equivalent intent). No console or network errors.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout - PO Number Validation
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] PO Number field visible at checkout for B2B org user (precondition)
testCases.notes: BLOCKED-BY-BUG (BUG-013-001). PO Number field is missing from B2B checkout entirely (see CHK-031). Cannot test optional/empty/filled validation paths when the field doesn't render. Tangential observation from CHK-071: order CO260505-00020 was placed with no PO field present and reached 'Processing' state successfully — so the absence of validation error on submit IS confirmed (consistent with the rewritten spec saying field is optional), but this is observable through the bug, not the feature. Re-test fully once BUG-013-001 is fixed.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout - PO Number Field Visible and Saved
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] PO Number input field visible at checkout (precondition)
testCases.notes: BLOCKED-BY-BUG (BUG-013-001). Identical scope to CHK-031 — PO Number field is not present in checkout UI. Order CO260505-00020 confirmation page does NOT display a PO number (no field collected). /account/orders 'Purchase order' column is empty for this order. Re-test once BUG-013-001 is fixed.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout - PO Number Optional (Proceeds Without)
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] PO Number field is visible but not marked as required (precondition)
testCases.notes: BLOCKED-BY-BUG (BUG-013-001). Cannot verify 'visible but not required' attribute when field is absent. Indirect evidence from CHK-071: order CO260505-00020 was placed without ANY PO input and succeeded — consistent with field being non-required at the API layer (createOrderFromCart accepted null/empty purchaseOrderNumber). However, the front-end UI assertion (field visible, not marked required) cannot pass while BUG-013-001 holds.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout - Order Appears in Organization Order History
testCases.notes: PASS. Placed real B2B order via CyberSource — Order CO260505-00020, total $275.99, Processing status. Steps verified: (1) /checkout/completed page shows 'Order CO260505-00020 has been successfully submitted'. (2) /account/orders 'My orders' tab lists the order with org-context shipping address (Beverly Hills BuildRight address) and applied 'QA' coupon discount. (3) /account/orders 'All orders' tab (org-wide view) shows the order with column 'Buyer name = Carlos Rodriguez' — confirming organization-level visibility. (4) Clicking the order opens detail at /account/orders/b6e9010e-a71e-48b0-98b0-7d599851587e in a new tab — order detail accessible from org history. Cross-layer: order successfully created via createOrderFromCart with org context (me.organization non-null inferred from BuildRight breadcrumb in header). Note: 'Purchase order' column in My orders is empty for this order — corroborates BUG-013-001. Admin verification of org link not executed in this run (Admin SPA query out of scope; org-scope inferred from storefront 'All orders' filter rendering Buyer name column).

testCases.title: B2B Checkout - Cost Center/Department Field
testCases.notes: SKIPPED per CSV documentation: 'FEATURE NOT IMPLEMENTED: Cost Center / Department field is not implemented in current storefront checkout. The field does not appear in the checkout form for any B2B user in QA. Do not execute.' Verified during this run — no Cost Center / Department input is rendered in the B2B checkout for Carlos / BuildRight (only Order Comment textarea exists in the metadata section). Automation_Status in CSV is 'N/A — feature not implemented'.
